titleStmt.title: SII 5.750: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 750. (A.R. No. 186 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE; LEFT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . tāmbrayādakṣiṇe ttire somatīrtthasya paścime . Etat vāmanarūpeṇa dvārakānātha
śāśanam . śāśvatam param .prasādam ceytaruḷiṉapaṭi śakābdam Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Aṟupattu muṉṟiṉmel
c cellāniṉṟa kollam 7 100 10 7 varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 5 pūrvvapakṣa ttu pūrṇai yum budha vāramum peṟṟa
Aśva tināḷ muḷḷiṉāṭṭu bahmadeyam śrīceraṉmātevicaturvvedima ṅkalattu vaṭapāl śrīmatdvārakā
nādhan Aruḷāl Āyiratteṇmaṉ pantaṟ kiḻ virakeraḷaṉpiṭattu nāmum nam peṇṭukaḷoṭuṅ kūṭi yirun
tu malaimaṇṭalattu Iravinallūr vaṭavāṟṟu Ayyappaṉ māttāṇṭaṉ kaṇakkāka nāmuṇṭa kalattil niṉṟuma dvādeśi toṟum Irupattunālu brāhma ṇar bu- jikkumpaṭi
kaṟpittu dvādeśi nāḷ Oṉṟukku bāhma ṇar per Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi Uri Āka per 2 10 4 kku Amutupaṭi ta4 kku U- 5- kku Uta3 pa2 kaṟiyamutukku I 6- m kīraikku I - m
Uppuamutukku I - m murampukku I 3- m miḷakamutu nna- kku kācu 1 I-m teṅkāyamutu U-kku kācu U-m neyyamutu nna- kku kācu U-m cāttuppaṭi palam �- kku kācu U-m Ilaiyamu
tu 9 10 6- kku kācu 1- m Aṭaikkāyamutu 4 10 8- kku kācu 1- m Ākak kācu 9 I-kku kācu 1- kku I 3 Āka I 3 pa4 Uri-m Erikarumpukku I 4- m Āka I 1 ḷa taru Urikku � Uri Āka mātam 1- kku dvā
deśi 2 Āka Āṇṭu 1- kku dvādeśi 2 10 4- m Atikam dvādeśi 1- m Āka dvādeśi 2 10 5- kku koṭṭai dha kka �-kku nammuṭaiya Aṟaiyil Oṭukkāṉa kaliyukarāmaṉ
ṭṭa 3 100 Ippaṇam muṉṉūṟṟukkum Ippaṟṟil nam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattil parameccuravāykkālukku meṟku A-ṅkaṇṇāṟu vīrapāṇṭiyaṉpalāṟṟukku vaṭakku Ivvū
r kūṭṭa cīraṅkaṉātaṉ kāṇiyāṭcaiyil Oṟṟi koṇṭa � kku kuṭutta ṭṭa 100 4 10 3- m Itaṉiṭai viṭṭu vaṭakku kalinārāyaṇaṉ Aḻakiyappaṉa kāṇiyāṭcaiyil Oṟṟi
koṇṭa � ttukku kuṭutta ṭṭa 100 5 10 7- m Āka ṭṭa 3 100 Ituvum vaṭakarai Appaṉ Oṭai nam kaṇṭuḻavil ṉām nammai Ārātaṉai ceyyum perkku kuṭutta nilattil
ṭṭa 3 100 8 10 5 nna- m � Ava-m kuṭuttu Oṟṟikoṇṭu tanta 3- ṅkkaṟu � 2 cu-m Āka pama� Inṉilam mākāṇi muntirikaiyil mutalākiṟa mutalkoṇṭu Ācandra
tāravat kallilum cempilum veṭṭi naṭakkumpaṭi kaṟpittu Aruḷāl Itu nam senāpa tikkum Okkum
Digital edition of SII 5.750 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
